workflow_goal: Generate a standalone first-order RC charging Modelica model.
requirements: Use only built-in Real declarations; do not import or reference external Modelica libraries.
Build a first-order RC charging transient driven by a 10 V source through a 1000 ohm resistor into a 1e-4 F capacitor.
The capacitor starts uncharged and should evolve dynamically from the source/resistor/capacitor relationship.
Expose the capacitor voltage as a simulation result variable named vc.
The model should be executable as a short transient simulation in OpenModelica.
acceptance: The final model must be complete Modelica source code.
The final model must declare the exact top-level model name WorkflowV02_GenRCCharge.
OpenModelica simulate(model_name) must reach an accepted simulation status with the specified stop_time, intervals, and warning policy.
The requested observable variable vc must appear in the generated model.
